settings.title: What's in the Everyday Jar?
settings.content: 100% grass-fed and finished tallow, whipped to perfection. No essential oils, no fillers, and no preservatives—just nature’s most bio-available moisturizer in its purest form

settings.title: What is Tallow?
settings.content: Tallow is a nutrient-dense, purified form of grass-fed beef fat that has been used for centuries as a foundational skin remedy. Because it is bio-identical to the sebum produced by human skin, it is recognized and absorbed as a skin-native ingredient rather than a foreign wax or oil.

settings.title: Why Does Tallow Work?
settings.content: Bio-identical to human sebum, tallow penetrates deep into the dermis to repair the skin barrier at a cellular level. It delivers essential fatty acids and vitamins exactly where your skin needs them most, mimicking your natural oils to hydrate without clogging pores.

settings.title: Does it smell like beef?
settings.content: Tallow is a nutrient-dense form of grass-fed beef fat.

settings.title: Why Does Grass-Fed Matter?
settings.content: Our 100% grass-fed tallow provides 5x more CLA to soothe redness, essential vitamins A, D, E, and K for cellular repair, and powerful antioxidants for age-defying results. Unlike grain-fed alternatives, grass-fed tallow maintains a perfect balance of nutrients that your skin can actually utilize.

settings.title: Will Tallow Cause Acne?
settings.content: Poorly rendered tallow often retains a lingering "meaty" smell, but our premium extraction process ensures a completely clean, neutral scent. We painstakingly purify our tallow to deliver all the benefits without the funk found in lower-grade options.

settings.benefit_desc: Your skin recognizes tallow immediately. Its molecular structure mimics human sebum, allowing for deep absorption without a greasy residues.
A naturally occurring powerhouse of fat-soluble Vitamins A, D, E, and K—essential nutrients for cell regeneration and long-term skin health.
Rich in Stearic and Oleic acids, the same building blocks found in your skin’s protective layer. It repairs damage and locks moisture in.
Contains Conjugated Linoleic Acid (CLA), a potent anti-inflammatory that actively calms redness, soothes irritation, and fights breakouts.
